markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Rafael Flores records 3+ total hits + runs + rbis in the Atlanta vs Pittsburgh professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jul 9, 2026 at 12:35 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Rafael Flores is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Rafael Flores starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Rafael Flores is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Rafael Flores is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on total hits + runs + rbis recorded.
markets.title: Rafael Flores: 3+ hits + runs + RBIs?
